violations.text: The following were observed in poor repair: -pizza prep unit and reach-in gaskets -chest freezer lid and gaskets. PIC has work orders in place, await parts. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (pickles) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Staff informed to cease behavior, pickles were disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

Garlic butter was observed on the counter held at 56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Container was returned to refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
ROP fish was observed thawing in the walk-in with packaging intact. Fish was 32 degrees F or colder and removed from packaging. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The following were observed not in good repair: -pizza prep unit gaskets -pizza refrigerator (condensate dripping into a bucket) -chest freezer (cracked gasket and lid, frost build-up). PIC stated repairs have been scheduled. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machines. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of residue and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The fan guards and floor of the keg walk-in have an accumulation of dust and beverage residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese, fruit) in the grill line reach-in and the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024

The presence of rodets is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings and a dead mouse in rear basement storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC stated pest control service is regularly once per month and has increased due to recent activity. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
A lid was observed in direct contact with ice cream in the chest freezer. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
Cases of single service items were observed stored under a waste pipe. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the pizza prep unit. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris: -stand mixer -slicer -ice machine- -shelving in server refrigerator. PIC directed staff to clean during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
A leak was observed from a waste line in the basement near canned food storage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

The receptacle in the handicap/staff toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

The walk-in freezer in the outdoor area is in poor repair. Inspector observed condensation near fans and a loose-fitting door. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the rear basement storage area, under the building overhang, and around/behind trash area. An excessive amount of leaf litter was observed under the building overhang. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

The floors in the rear basement area (foundation floor) was observed with several cracks and holes, exposing the dirt below. Holes were observed in the wall/floor junctures in the same area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2024
The ceiling in the pizza prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
Lights were non-functional at the prep area hood. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

Tape was observed on part of the ansul system. PIC stated that the piece rattles during use; unit is in process of a repair (ansul system and ventilation were functional during inspection) and awaiting final piece scheduled for installation on 11/29. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
Ice buckets are not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen, back kitchen, and pizza areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The dumpster outside is located on the ground. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024

Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Hand sinks are lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands must be posted at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Open container of shrimp was adulterated with frost and debris in the chest freezer. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Observed open containers of food in freezers. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

A plastic-wrapped head of lettuce was observed in the mixed greens in the prep table. A plastic container of tomatoes was observed inside a large plastic container of greens. Food must be protected from contamination. Disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, mixers, stacked metal bowls, tomato slicer, and citrus juicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Chicken, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken, and pasta were placed hot in the refrigerator in covered plastic containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Thermometers are lacking in some refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Water observed in stacked containers on the air drying rack. After cleaning & sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen, back kitchen, and pizza area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Single service are stored in a basement room beneath a sewage pipe.Cleaned and SANITIZED EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, laundered LINENS, and SINGLESERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES may not be stored: (1) In locker rooms; (2) In toilet rooms; (3) In garbage rooms; (4) In mechanical rooms; (5) Under sewer lines that are not shielded to intercept potential drips; (6) Under leaking water lines including leaking automatic fire sprinkler heads or under lines on which water has condensed; (7) Under open stairwells; or (8) Under other sources of contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The cutting boards at a prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
Plastic food containers, the food processor, a tomato slicer, and a vegetable chopper observed not in good repair, cracked with pieces missing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer, mixers, can opener base, prep unit, top of cold drawer unit beneath grill, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris.The chest freezer has an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The dumpster outside is located on the ground. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024
The grease recycling bin has an accumulation of grease and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The drywall in the basement is in poor repair, with parts torn and or missing, exposing spun insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The light shield in the pizza area has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The frp at the top of the basement stairs, and along a kitchen ceiling beam is in poor repair, pulling away from the surfaces. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The floors especially in the basement have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and areas of the basement. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The painted wood shelves in the basement storage area are in poor repair, with chipped and peeling paint & wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

The ceiling in the basement is in poor repair, with parts torn and or missing, exposing spun insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
